name: Oprah's Classic Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash potatoes well, leaving the skin on.
2. Cut potatoes in half lengthwise.
3. Place potatoes in a kettle and cover with water to just below the surface of the potatoes.
4. Bring water to a boil over high heat.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer until potatoes are very tender.
6. Drain all the water from the kettle, leaving the potatoes hot.
7. Add butter to the hot potatoes while stirring.
8. Begin hand-mashing the potatoes with the butter.
9. Gradually add horseradish, heavy cream, salt, and pepper, continuing to mash until creamy but slightly lumpy.
10. Serve 6-8 portions or about 10-12 cups.
